role: Understanding life destiny purpose and sharing in the Spirit's limitless power
treePosition: As presented in the workbook, immediately after Amen — inferred from page order and the 'start with Amen... ending with Geb' instruction, not independently verified against the wider Kamitic Meditation canon.
teachingNotes: Enduring and Growing through deep life lessons.
Sharing in the Limitless Power of the Spirit to do what is not "humanly" possible.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being endowed with the ability to share in God's omnipotence. I Have qualified to be one with God. Nothing can hold me back.
Evolution is a fact of nature. I am in harmony with its objective. Its mighty power is behind me.
Many believe that present mankind is the goal of evolution. I know that it is the coming forth of a Divine Mankind that I am striving to achieve with God, my partner.
Anger, fear, worry, grief, sadness, and stress, are the signatures of the human kind of man. I am a divine being.
I am empowered by the knowledge that the difficulties in life come from going it alone. Thank you, God for sharing your endless power with me.
The difficulties in life are not the losses, and obstructions but our negative responses to them. My peace and joy in your support empowers me to move on and on.
Verily! It is not resilience, but the peaceful arm of God.
Peace in the midst of obstructions and losses transforms them into genuine opportunities to share in God's omnipotence.
